title: Nature's Mechanics: How Trees Communicate

scenes.text: Did you know that trees can communicate with each other underground?
Trees use a network of fungi to share nutrients and information.
This communication helps trees warn each other of threats like pests and drought.
Imagine a whole forest working together to survive!
scenes.label: FOREST COOPERATION!

scenes.text: Follow to feed your curious mind daily.

description: Trees communicate through a vast underground network, sharing nutrients and warning each other of dangers. Follow for daily science!
